basic_details.job_title: Sambalpur University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Performing Arts, Ph.D. or NET (preferred)
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Guest Faculty): As per UGC Guidelines, 2018. Ph.D/NET preferred; otherwise Post Graduate Degree with good academic record.

salary_details.details: Rs.1000/- per class (Max. Rs.60000/-) with Ph.D or Rs.750/- per class (Max. Rs.45000/-) without Ph.D

selection_process: General Career Evaluation Research Degree Evaluation Demo Class Research Publications Evaluation Viva Voce

all_official_links.label: Download Sambalpur University Assistant Professor (Guest Faculty) Job 2026 Notif

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Sambalpur University recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Assistant Professor (Guest Faculty) at Sambalpur University.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Assistant Professor (Guest Faculty) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor (Guest Faculty) post?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 45000 to Rs. 60000 Per Month, depending on qualifications and per-class rate.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required?
faq.answer: A Post Graduate Degree in Performing Arts is required. Ph.D. or NET qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes General Career Evaluation, Research Degree Evaluation, Demo Class, Research Publications Evaluation, and Viva Voce.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue is Sambalpur University, Sambalpur, Odisha - 768019.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.
